destinations.title: Home
destinations.description: Unified platform shell ready. Select a destination from the left rail to continue through one stable navigation and content surface.

destinations.title: Continuity
destinations.description: Continuity surfaces, history, and active route traces belong here in one stable shell destination.

subdestinations.label: Actions
subdestinations.detail_copy: History traversal, active route logic, and continuity operating actions.

subdestinations.label: Public Surfaces
subdestinations.detail_copy: Published continuity, history, and knowledge routes linked from the homepage shell.

destinations.title: Workspace
destinations.description: Current interaction state, workspace actions, and operating context belong here in one stable shell destination.

subdestinations.label: Current Interaction
subdestinations.detail_copy: Live voice mode, route state, and interaction continuity from the homepage surface.

subdestinations.label: Model Overview
subdestinations.detail_copy: Canonical model records, owner state, and creation workflow from the Supabase-backed model layer.

subdestinations.label: Create Model
subdestinations.detail_copy: Open the canonical model-design and training control surface for profile-linked continuity models.

subdestinations.label: Developer Mode
subdestinations.detail_copy: Open the governed Codex Sessions layer for provider selection, repository scope, voice/text commands, review, approval, and release traceability.

subdestinations.label: Sources
subdestinations.detail_copy: Model-owned source authorization and connector readiness.

subdestinations.label: Training
subdestinations.detail_copy: Training, ingestion, provenance, and retrieval readiness states.

subdestinations.label: Runtime
subdestinations.detail_copy: Provider routing, active model state, and publication controls.

subdestinations.label: Continuity Actions
subdestinations.detail_copy: Continue by voice, open continuity history, or move into linked knowledge surfaces.

subdestinations.label: Public Surfaces
subdestinations.detail_copy: Homepage-linked public surfaces for continuity, research, and product context.

destinations.title: Profile, subscription, trust, and account control
destinations.description: Identity, subscription, verification, and account-control surfaces belong here in one stable shell destination.

subdestinations.label: Overview
subdestinations.detail_copy: Avatar, identity, public-route readiness, plan state, and quick trust signals.

subdestinations.label: Account Control
subdestinations.detail_copy: Account identity, subscription, owned models, verification, and linked accounts.

subdestinations.label: Shortcuts
subdestinations.detail_copy: Jump directly into dashboard, settings, and sign-out control from one governed surface.

destinations.title: General, appearance, voice, permissions, privacy, and runtime controls
destinations.description: Website settings mirror the ICOS software settings taxonomy from one stable shell destination.

subdestinations.label: General
subdestinations.detail_copy: Defaults, startup posture, behavior, shortcuts, and reset controls.

subdestinations.label: Appearance
subdestinations.detail_copy: Mode, palette, colors, contrast, motion, display, and shell visual controls.

subdestinations.label: Voice
subdestinations.detail_copy: Input, output, training, language, and wake/hold settings.

subdestinations.label: Permissions
subdestinations.detail_copy: Files, microphone, camera, notifications, browser, contacts, and accessibility access.

subdestinations.label: Privacy
subdestinations.detail_copy: Retention, export/delete, public/private state, telemetry, and linked sources.

subdestinations.label: Accessibility
subdestinations.detail_copy: Text, contrast, motion, captions, keyboard, and screen reader settings.

subdestinations.label: Configuration
subdestinations.detail_copy: Runtime, environment, worktree, browser use, chat management, and events.

subdestinations.label: Connectors
subdestinations.detail_copy: Cloud providers, Local LLM, API keys, models, and health.

subdestinations.label: Personalization
subdestinations.detail_copy: Profile, identity, memory, tone, style, and social graph settings.

subdestinations.label: Dashboard
subdestinations.detail_copy: Model dashboard, activity, analytics, health, readiness, and knowledge graph surfaces.

subdestinations.label: Storage & Backup
subdestinations.detail_copy: Local data, backup, restore, sync, export, and archive controls.

subdestinations.label: Security
subdestinations.detail_copy: Sign-in, sessions, linked accounts, trust, two-factor, and anti-impersonation controls.

destinations.title: Messaging
destinations.description: Messaging and continuity-linked conversations belong in the governed communication layer.

subdestinations.label: Overview
subdestinations.detail_copy: Messaging and continuity-linked conversations will land here as the platform communication layer.

destinations.title: Notifications
destinations.description: Trust-sensitive updates, account alerts, and continuity-state notifications belong here.

subdestinations.label: Overview
subdestinations.detail_copy: Verification changes, activity alerts, and platform notifications will resolve here.

destinations.title: More
destinations.description: Institutional and supporting surfaces remain available from the secondary linked items without duplicating the deeper shell architecture.

subdestinations.label: Overview
subdestinations.detail_copy: Institutional, legal, and support surfaces remain grouped here without overloading the primary product navigation.
